name: sub-performance-engineer
description: Performance analysis and optimization agent for JVM, DB, and system-level profiling

hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(kt|java)$'; then content=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.new_string // .content // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$content" | grep -qiE '(Thread\.sleep|synchronized|N\+1|findAll.*forEach)'; then echo "[PerfEngineer] Warning: Potential performance anti-pattern detected in $file"; fi; fi || true
